custom_type.description: Extension message type. The server applies the configured UTF-8 byte limit (INTER_AGENT_CUSTOM_TYPE_MAX).

to.description: Optional target routing name or unambiguous routing-name prefix. Exact names are resolved before prefixes.

payload.description: Pass-through JSON payload. The server applies the configured JSON-encoded UTF-8 byte limit (INTER_AGENT_CUSTOM_PAYLOAD_MAX).
